title: ephemerantha smithii
intro: Ephemerantha smithii, also known as the Smith's orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ephemerantha smithii include its potential to treat fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused in water to make a herbal tea, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
